fixture_note: PLACEHOLDER fixture pinned at S22-N4 ship-time. Operator overwrites with the real recorded response by running `pytest -m live_paysh -k coingecko`. paysponge/coingecko has min_price_usd=0 (free tier) so cost may settle to 0; the contract test asserts cost_usd >= 0 rather than > 0 for this provider.

body.narrative: CoinGecko Onchain DEX returned the top trending pools across the requested network slice. For a Solana-native neobank the relevant frame is the USDC-paired top-10 by 24h volume on Raydium and Orca; that pool list anchors the market-making surface a neobank's swap product would sit on top of.
